overview.description: Next-gen sim racing telemetry analysis and visualization platform
overview.description_long: RACEMAKE is a web-based telemetry analysis and visualization platform built by sim racers for sim racers. It replaces traditional numbers-only telemetry tools with dynamic racing line visualizations, brake/throttle overlays, and lap comparison tools. With 7000+ drivers on the platform, RACEMAKE aims to simplify data interpretation to help drivers find lap time. The company describes itself as a spin-off from SETSBASE, with long-term ambitions to expand into real motorsport telemetry. AI-powered coaching features are listed on the product roadmap.
overview.tagline: Level up your racing skill, get faster and win

history.origin_story: Spin-off from SETSBASE; founded by sim racing enthusiasts in Prague to make telemetry analysis accessible beyond traditional graph-heavy tools like Motec.

key_milestones.event: Open Beta 0.8 launched, limited to 499 users, supporting Assetto Corsa Competizione
Privacy Policy effective date March 2024 — product went live
Open Beta reached 100,000+ laps recorded; Founders Edition (199 spots, $99 for 3 years) sold out
Early Access launched at $4.99/month with unlimited laps

leadership.name: Milan
leadership.role: Founder / Product (first name only from blog)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core value is data visualization and lap analysis — relatively thin on proprietary AI, with AI features still on the roadmap. However, the product moat lies in the UX/visualization layer and community of 7000+ racers with laps data, not in raw AI capability.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The sim racing telemetry niche is small and already served by established tools (Motec, CrewChief, Simucube). RACEMAKE targets consumer sim racers with a freemium model, making it hard to achieve significant revenue scale without expansion into professional motorsport.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding. Very small team (1-10 people), early-stage freemium product with a $4.99/month price point and limited Founders Edition ($99 lifetime) as primary revenue. Runway and burn rate unknown.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Early-stage bootstrapped startup in a niche consumer market with no known funding, limited team size, and AI features still on the roadmap. While the product shows traction (7000+ users, 100k+ laps), the path to sustainability is unclear.

metadata.notes: RACEMAKE is a spin-off from SETSBASE per their blog. Blog author 'Milan' is likely a founder but full name not found publicly. Company address: Zenklova 24/54, Libeň, 18000 Praha 8. ICO: 17854881. The product is primarily a data visualization tool for sim racers; AI coaching features are listed as future functionality in the Founders Edition roadmap.
